sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Everus (ECG) Price Target Raised on Record Backlog Growth
feed.summary: Freedom Capital Markets and Cantor Fitzgerald have both raised their price targets for Everus Construction Group Inc. (NYSE:ECG) following strong financial results and a record backlog. Everus reported earnings and revenue that exceeded forecasts, alongside favorable underlying end-market conditions, particularly in data centers, transmission, and distribution. The company is a recent spin-off that hedge funds are increasingly investing in.

feed.title: IShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF Options Spot-On: On March 30th, 423.39K Contracts Were Traded, With 5.97 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 30th, the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (EEM.US) experienced significant options trading, with a total volume of 423.39K contracts. Put options constituted 62.3% of transactions, while call options made up 37.7%. The ETF's open interest stood at approximately 5.97 million contracts, representing 90.33% of the past 30 trading days' average.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. Reports Massive Revenue Growth
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp., a Nasdaq-listed blockchain technology company, reported a massive 442% increase in revenue for its fiscal year 2025. This growth is attributed to the surging demand for its innovative decentralized finance (DeFi) solutions, including a lending platform, automated market maker, and NFT marketplace. The company's success highlights the transformative potential of blockchain technology in the financial industry.

feed.title: DPRO Analyst Rating: HC Wainwright & Co. Reiterates Buy Rating a
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Draganfly (DPRO), maintaining a price target of $14.00 USD. This decision, led by analyst Scott Buck, reflects a consistent positive outlook for the company. Draganfly, a Canada-based firm, specializes in engineering services and the manufacture of commercial unmanned vehicle systems and software, generating most of its revenue from its Drones segment.

feed.title: \u2018Turn around\u2019: Passenger records from Delta flight while engine sparks after takeoff
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines flight from S\u00e3o Paulo, Brazil, to Atlanta was forced to return to its origin airport shortly after takeoff due to a mechanical issue with its left engine. A passenger captured video inside the aircraft showing the engine sparking, and passengers could be heard yelling "Turn around." Delta confirmed the plane landed safely and apologized to customers for the delay, stating that the safety of passengers and crew is their highest priority.

feed.title: Oracle and NetSuite Deliver New AI-Powered Solution for Restaurant Operations
feed.summary: Oracle and NetSuite have introduced an AI-powered solution called Oracle NetSuite Restaurant Operations, designed to improve efficiency and profitability for restaurants by unifying critical back-office functions. This new offering centralizes inventory, procurement, scheduling, production, and cash management data for real-time visibility and enhanced decision-making. The solution leverages over 25 years of hospitality expertise and embedded AI to automate tasks and streamline operations for various restaurant sizes, integrating with Oracle Simphony Cloud and other POS systems.

feed.title: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) Receives Average Rating of "Reduce" from Brokerages
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) has received a consensus "Reduce" rating from nineteen brokerages, with an average 1-year target price of $39.2143. Several analysts have adjusted their price targets and ratings, primarily maintaining "hold" or "neutral" stances, while a minority recommends "sell" or "buy." The company's stock shows a market capitalization of $5.67 billion and has recently traded around $39.98.

feed.title: Aumenta la luz: aprobaron los nuevos cuadros tarifarios que regirán a partir de abril
feed.summary: Argentina's National Electricity Regulatory Entity (ENRE) approved new electricity tariff schedules for Edenor and Edesur, set to begin April 1st, 2026. These increases will apply to residential users with and without subsidies, as well as to neighborhood clubs and public welfare entities. This follows a recent hike in gas tariffs for the AMBA region, with the government aiming to adjust rates to the economic context and current energy subsidy programs.

feed.title: Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd. Announces Reinsurance Transaction with Japan Post Insurance Company
feed.summary: Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd. has entered into a coinsurance agreement with Japan Post Insurance Co., Ltd. to reinsure a block of whole life annuities, effective March 31, 2026. This marks Aflac Re's first external reinsurance transaction and aims to strengthen the strategic partnership with Japan Post Insurance. The collaboration seeks to create shared value for policyholders and shareholders while leveraging Aflac Re's expertise to support Japanese life insurers in risk reduction and capital management.

feed.title: UK Royal Navy Awards Teledyne Contract for Underwater Gliders
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has secured a contract from the UK Ministry of Defence to supply the Royal Navy with autonomous ocean observing systems, including gliders and floats, for its Future Maritime Data Gathering (FMDG) program. This agreement enhances the Royal Navy's ability to collect high-quality environmental data in complex and remote maritime environments, supporting operational planning and defence activities. The contract reinforces the Royal Navy's long-standing use of Teledyne's unmanned systems, essential for understanding the underwater battlespace and maintaining an information advantage.

feed.title: New Oriental will post quarterly results before the U.S. open April 22
feed.summary: New Oriental Education & Technology Group (NYSE: EDU) is scheduled to report its third-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on April 22, 2026, before the U.S. market opens. The results cover the period ending February 28, 2026, and will be followed by a management conference call at 8:00 AM ET. Investors can register for dial-in details or access a live webcast and replay of the call.

feed.title: Aflac lands first outside reinsurance deal with Japan Post
feed.summary: Aflac (NYSE: AFL) announced that its subsidiary, Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd., has entered into a reinsurance agreement with Japan Post Insurance Company, effective March 31, 2026. This deal marks Aflac Re's first external-party reinsurance transaction, involving a block of whole life annuities through coinsurance, while Japan Post Insurance will continue to service the policies. The agreement strengthens their strategic partnership, supporting risk reduction, capital management, and new business opportunities.

feed.title: Broadcom Inc. Stock: AI Powerhouse Faces Technical Pullback Amid Strong Fundamentals and Dividend Pa
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) shares recently experienced a technical pullback below the $300 support level, despite strong Q1 earnings, high demand for its AI technology, and a declared quarterly dividend. The company is a key player in the semiconductor industry, benefiting from AI infrastructure investments and strategic partnerships. While short-term technical indicators show weakness, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, anticipating sustained growth driven by its core business and capital return strategy.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) Given Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $134.00. Institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings in the company, showcasing strong confidence. Despite positive trends in streaming profitability and theme park expansion, concerns remain regarding tech partnership setbacks and analyst caution.

feed.title: A Look Back at Consumer Discretionary - Travel and Vacation Providers Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Royal Caribbean (NYSE:RCL) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
feed.summary: This article reviews the Q4 earnings for travel and vacation providers, focusing on Royal Caribbean (NYSE:RCL) in comparison to its peers. It highlights strong post-pandemic travel demand as a tailwind, but notes macroeconomic sensitivities and competition as headwinds for the sector. The article details individual company performances including Viking (NYSE:VIK) as the best performer and Hilton Grand Vacations (NYSE:HGV) as the weakest, alongside an overview of Marriott Vacations (NYSE:VAC) and Wyndham (NYSE:WH).

feed.title: Change in motion: Philip Morris International releases Value Report 2025 and new Value Plan 2030+
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PMI) has published its inaugural Value Report 2025, detailing its sustainable value creation approach and marking the completion of its 2025 Roadmap. The report introduces the new Value Plan 2030+, which focuses on sustainable growth, accelerating smoke-free product business, and long-term business resilience. PMI achieved significant progress in 2025, including 43.5 million adult consumers of smoke-free products and smoke-free net revenues reaching USD 16.9 billion.
